form.formComment: Flew the lids with a fast early split last time, hitting the frame with a 3.5 lengths third (17.76) over 300m at this track and making it two placings on end. Some good form is emerging from that last run. Expected to prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Flew the lids with a fast early split last time, hitting the frame with a 3.5 lengths third (17.76) over 300m at this track and making it two placings on end. Some good form is emerging from that last run. Expected to prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished last on March 28 over 300m at this track behind Dark Room beaten 22 lengths (19.09) in a Maiden. Should prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished last on March 28 over 300m at this track behind Dark Room beaten 22 lengths (19.09) in a Maiden. Should prove hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Heels galloped on entering the first turn.

form.formComment: Lines up from box 3 for the first time after finishing a 7 length fifth at this track (18.55) in a Maiden. Others rate better this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Lines up from box 3 for the first time after finishing a 7 length fifth at this track (18.55) in a Maiden. Others rate better this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off heels and lost considerable ground rounding the first turn.
Heels galloped on and lost ground rounding the first turn.
Was bumped and became unbalanced rounding the turn into the home straight.

form.formComment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and drifts back in her races. Last start finished sixth over 366m at Capalaba, beaten 216 lengths. Others make more appeal.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and drifts back in her races. Last start finished sixth over 366m at Capalaba, beaten 216 lengths. Others make more appeal.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted in and made contact with the rail exiting the back straight.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage seventh last time out over 400m at The Gardens. Hard to have this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage seventh last time out over 400m at The Gardens. Hard to have this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Eased off heels entering the first turn.

form.formComment: Ran an eye-catching race on debut when settled well off the lead early but got home well to finish second (17.63) at this track over 300m. Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Ran an eye-catching race on debut when settled well off the lead early but got home well to finish second (17.63) at this track over 300m. Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and tends to spot them a start in his races, Last start finished fifth over 300m at this track, beaten 13 lengths. Happy to risk this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and tends to spot them a start in his races, Last start finished fifth over 300m at this track, beaten 13 lengths. Happy to risk this time.

form.formComment: Debutant by Nomia Mack from Pegasus Pal. Trained by Jason Carter. The market will give the best guide to her chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Debutant by Nomia Mack from Pegasus Pal. Trained by Jason Carter. The market will give the best guide to her chances.

form.formComment: Ended last campaign with a fifth (20.94) in a MDN at Capalaba and returns after a four months break. Others preferred.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Ended last campaign with a fifth (20.94) in a MDN at Capalaba and returns after a four months break. Others preferred.

form.formComment: First two runs have been average, the latest a sixth over 300m at this track. Be tough to make an impression against this lot.
